reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. This would not be a seizure, but this could be a tremor, and such tremors are due to degenerative disease of the spinal cord disks. This needs to be ruled out. This is what I can provide as my opinion based on the history given here. If I were her doctor, then I would try administering diazepam five milligrams once a day on a tentative basis. Hope this information helps, and have a nice day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I really appreciate your concern. This would not be a seizure, but this could be a tremor, and such tremors are due to degenerative disease of the spinal cord discs. This needs to be ruled out. This is what I can provide as my opinion based on the history given here. If I were her doctor, then I would try administering diazepam 5mg once a day on a tentative basis. Hope this information helps, and have a nice day.
